title: PhD Positions
description: We welcome applicants interested in clinical psychology, mental health, assessment, psychotherapy, and related research areas.

title: Master's Positions
description: Master's students may participate in ongoing projects involving assessment, intervention research, and science communication.

title: Research Assistant Positions
description: Research assistants support literature review, data collection, data organization, project coordination, and outreach activities.

title: Visiting Students
description: Visiting students with relevant training may contact the lab to discuss short-term research opportunities.
